name: Guacomole Dip or Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a ripe avocado.
2. After mashing the avocado, immediately add lemon juice.
3. Finely mince the onion.
4. Add enough cayenne pepper to make the flavor sharp, not hot.
5. Incorporate Miracle Whip in small amounts until the mixture is smooth.
6. To use as a salad dressing, add additional Miracle Whip for desired consistency.
